CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Big Tech"), "Big Tech", IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Agency"), 'Agency', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "AdTech and AdNetwork"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "B2B Software"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Logistics and Shipping"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Payments") ), "B2B Services", IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Consulting and Market Research"), "Consulting and Market Research", IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "CPG, Food & Beverages"), "CPG", IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Financial services"), "Financial services", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Equity Research"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Hedge Funds and Asset Management"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Investment Banking"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Investors"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Private Equity and Venture Capital") ), "Investors", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Classifieds"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Media and Entertainment") ), "Publishers / Classifieds", IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Retail / eCommerce"), "Retail and eCommerce", IF( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Travel and Hospitality"), "Travel", IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Automotive and Transportation"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "B2C Internet Services"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Education"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Gambling / Gaming"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Other"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Pharma and Healthcare"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Government Public Sector & Non Profit"), ISPICKVAL(SW_Industry__c, "Telecom and Hardware") ), "Tier 2", "" ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Industry Cluster
